endpoints.name: Returns a list of districts
endpoints.description: Search the SchoolDigger database for districts. You may use any combination of criteria as query parameters.

endpoints.name: Returns a detailed record for one district
endpoints.description: Retrieve a single district record from the SchoolDigger database
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Returns a SchoolDigger district ranking list
endpoints.description: Returns a SchoolDigger district ranking list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ST}} with a real st.

endpoints.name: Returns a SchoolDigger school ranking list
endpoints.description: Returns a SchoolDigger school ranking list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ST}} with a real st.

endpoints.name: Returns a list of schools
endpoints.description: Search the SchoolDigger database for schools. You may use any combination of criteria as query parameters.

endpoints.name: Returns a detailed record for one school
endpoints.description: Retrieve a school record from the SchoolDigger database
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
